description_long: This is a stylized AK-pattern rifle featuring a distinctive camouflage pattern in muted earth tones, including tan, green, and orange. The rifle has a fixed wooden or polymer stock, a curved detachable box magazine, and a standard-length barrel. The receiver and handguard are detailed with visible mechanical components, such as the charging handle and gas tube. Iron sights are mounted on the top, with the front sight post and rear notch clearly visible. The surface finish appears matte, with a slightly rough texture, and the overall build suggests a robust, utilitarian design typical of military rifles.
description: A camouflaged AK-style rifle with a fixed stock, curved magazine, and matte, earth-toned finish. Features iron sights and a standard barrel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, including the stock, magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the magazine, trigger, and charging handle details.
